# Akash Mahajan

> Founder of Kloudle and Appsecco. Security practitioner and builder. Creating cloud security tools, AI agents, and open-source projects.

Akash Mahajan runs two security companies and maintains 26+ active projects focused on agentic security, AI agent tooling, and security education. Based in India.

For full context including all project descriptions, see [llms-full.txt](https://akashm.dev/llms-full.txt).

## Links

- [About](https://akashm.dev/about): Background, philosophy, and contact links
- [Now](https://akashm.dev/now): What Akash is currently focused on
- [Books](https://akashm.dev/books): Published books and newsletters
- [Projects JSON](https://akashm.dev/api/projects.json): Machine-readable project data
- [Kloudle](https://kloudle.com): Cloud security posture management for the agent era
- [Appsecco](https://appsecco.com): Application security consulting and training

## Projects

- [IndusClaw](https://github.com/makash/indus-claw): India-centric open-source AI agent platform
- [ccrank](https://github.com/makash/ccrank): Claude Code usage leaderboard and analytics
- [agent-browser](https://github.com/makash/agent-browser): Stealth browser automation CLI for security and agent workflows
- [oxydra](https://github.com/makash/oxydra): Many-heads agent experimentation framework
- [Vulnerable MCP Servers Lab](https://github.com/appsecco/vulnerable-mcp-servers-lab): Deliberately vulnerable MCP servers for training
- [Pentesting MCP Servers Checklist](https://github.com/appsecco/pentesting-mcp-servers-checklist): Practical checklist for MCP server security
- [MCP Client & Proxy](https://github.com/appsecco/mcp-client-and-proxy): MCP client with proxying for security testing
- [Raptor](https://github.com/appsecco/raptor): Claude Code configured for adversarial security workflows
- [Open CVDB](https://github.com/Kloudle/open-cvdb): Open cloud vulnerability and misconfiguration database
- [AWS IAM Large Account Security](https://github.com/Kloudle/aws-iam-large-account-security): IAM security for large AWS accounts

## Optional

- [clawdwa](https://github.com/makash/clawdwa): Claude from WhatsApp groups
- [Learn Claude Code](https://github.com/makash/learn-claude-code): Practical workbooks for founders and engineers
- [great-web-copy](https://github.com/makash/great-web-copy): Copywriting plugin for Claude Code
- [pmf-plugin](https://github.com/makash/pmf-plugin): PMF discovery and validation toolkit
- [Cloud Security List](https://github.com/makash/cloud-security-list): Curated cloud security resources
- [Grandoldbooks to EPUB](https://github.com/makash/Grandoldbooks-to-epub): Generate EPUB books from public-domain classics
- [Learn Kannada Alphabet](https://github.com/makash/learn-kannada-alphabet-for-kids): Educational PWA for Kannada
- [Scam Calls India](https://github.com/makash/scam-calls-india): Scam call pattern awareness
